option.value:
# Coupons Management (Admin)
This module provides the Admin Coupons Management UI and data access.
## Scope - List/search/filter coupons - Create/update/delete coupons - Show quick stats (active, expiring soon, total used, top used)
## Run (manual) - Open app and go to Tab "Khác" -> "Mã giảm giá". - Use the "+ Thêm mã" button to create or edit coupons.
## Tests - `test/coupons/coupon_models_test.dart`
